prompt: A luminous, ultra-detailed anime-style wedding portrait of two brides in a romantic white chapel filled with soft ivory light, sheer curtains, carved arches, pale floral arrangements, and sparkling bokeh. The composition is vertical and elegant, showing the pair from about thigh-up to full dress detail, standing close together in an intimate yuri moment. The taller bride on the left has warm chestnut brown long wavy hair cascading over her shoulders and back, wearing a refined white bridal pantsuit with a fitted tailcoat, gold buttons, a cream vest, a silk cravat, subtle floral embroidery along the coat tails, and a white rose boutonniere with pale blue accents. She is visibly emotional, gently wiping tears with a handkerchief, her other hand resting near her chest, giving the feeling of being moved by the ceremony. The shorter bride on the right has long black hair, very long and glossy, and wears an ornate off-shoulder wedding gown in white with icy blue undertones, translucent lace sleeves, intricate beadwork, floral embroidery, layered ruffles, and a long veil decorated with tiny flowers and crystal-like details. A silver floral hair ornament with dangling pieces decorates the side of her head. She looks up at her partner tenderly while holding a cascading bouquet of white roses, blue flowers, and trailing greenery. Emphasize the contrast between the tailored princely suit and the delicate fairy-tale gown, with luxurious fabric textures, lace transparency, fine embroidery, soft glowing highlights, drifting sparkles, and a dreamy, emotional atmosphere. Make the scene feel like an original yuri wedding between an older office lady-style bride and a younger nurse-style bride, painted in polished, high-end romantic illustration style, ethereal, graceful, and heartfelt.
